jobs.title: Senior Next.js Developer
jobs.qualifications: B.Tech in CSE, MCA, or equivalent technical degree
jobs.description: We are seeking a Senior Next.js Developer to join our core development team. You will lead the engineering of highly interactive, blazing-fast web applications, e-commerce storefronts, and customized headless dashboards for our international clients.
requirements: Strong experience with React, Next.js (App Router), and TypeScript.
Proficiency in state management, TailwindCSS, and custom responsive animations.
Experience optimizing Next.js Core Web Vitals and SSR/SSG caching strategies.
Excellent communication and team leadership capabilities.

jobs.title: Digital Marketing Specialist
jobs.qualifications: MBA in Marketing, Bachelor's in Business, or related degree
jobs.description: Join our marketing powerhouse as a Lead Strategist! You will design, execute, and monitor high-converting Google Ads (PPC), Facebook Blueprint marketing funnels, and organic search engine growth campaigns for top-tier Indian and global brands.
requirements: Proven experience managing monthly ad spends of 5L+ INR.
Certified in Google Ads Search/Display and Facebook Blueprint.
Deep expertise in Google Analytics (GA4), heatmaps, and landing page conversions.
Stellar writing skills for copywriting and marketing copy.

blogs.title: Why Next.js is the Uncontested Future of Enterprise Web Development
blogs.summary: Discover why global corporations and agile startups are standardizing their web architecture on Next.js to achieve exceptional SEO results and lightning-fast speeds.
blogs.content: Next.js has evolved from a simple server-rendering framework to a robust, all-in-one web engineering platform. In 2026, user experience and speed dictate business success online. Headless architectures powered by Next.js and Tailwind CSS allow enterprise platforms to load in milliseconds while serving highly dynamic, database-driven contents. We discuss how companies switching to Next.js see average conversion bumps of 25% due to reduced bounce rates.
blogs.author: Ananya Solutions Technical Team

blogs.title: 5 SEO Growth Hacks Every Hyderabad Business Needs to Implement Today
blogs.summary: Local searches in Hyderabad are growing by 150% year-on-year. Learn how to rank #1 on Google Maps and organic listings with modern search optimization secrets.
blogs.content: Local SEO is the highest ROI marketing strategy available today. By building highly structured geo-targeted pages, optimizing your Google Business Profile with rich reviews and updates, and using Schema markup, your business can intercept high-intent buyers looking for your services. We breakdown the specific keyword strategies and performance optimizations that helped our clients increase organic leads by 300%.
blogs.author: Certified SEO Specialists
